WebGIS

The WebGIS module in miraX provides an interactive geospatial interface for visualising, analysing, and interacting with spatial data in real time.

It acts as the primary entry point for users to explore system conditions, layers, and model outputs.

Key Capabilities

  • Interactive map navigation (zoom, pan, layer control)
  • Multi-layer data visualisation
  • Real-time data integration
  • Scenario-based overlays
  • Spatial analysis tools
  • Integration with models and IoT data

Typical Workflow

  1. Load base map
  2. Add data layers (GeoJSON, raster, sensors)
  3. Apply filters or styling
  4. Analyse spatial patterns
  5. Export or share results

Supported Data Types

  • Vector data (GeoJSON, shapefiles)
  • Raster data (imagery, elevation)
  • Real-time sensor feeds
  • Model outputs

Suggested Images

  • Screenshot of map interface with multiple layers
  • Example of flood map overlay
  • Layer control panel
  • Time slider (if available)
